name: Cattle Ranch Barbeque Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb bacon grease or 1 cup Wesson oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large pot.
2. Simmer on very low heat for at least 20 minutes.
3. Strain the mixture and store it in an airtight container.
4. Use to sauce 25 lbs of meat.
5. Excellent for spareribs.
